# dropdownlogistics.com
# AI Context Manifest - llms.txt v1.3
# Last updated: 2026-03-07
# For the styled version, visit: /ai
# For the governance page, visit: /backend

## IDENTITY

site: dropdownlogistics.com
name: Dropdown Logistics (DDL)
operator: Dave Kitchens (D.K. Hale)
credentials: CPA - 10+ years internal audit
role: Commission Analyst II (transitioned from Senior Staff Auditor)
methodology: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
design_system: CottageHumble ("Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.")
stack: Next.js 14 - Vercel - Static HTML iframes - React components
status: Active development - 160+ routes - 44 systems - 65 standards
local_ai: Dex Jr. (Seat 1010) - RTX 3070 - Ollama - 8 models - 140K RAG chunks

## WHAT CHANGED IN v1.3

v1.2 -> v1.3 (2026-03-07):
- FrontDoor landing page replaced root with human-language entry
- BackEnd governance page deployed at /backend
- PreviewFrame component deployed across 28 iframe pages
- Cmd+K site search with fuzzy route matching plus deep RAG search
- MindFrame live chat session at /mindframe/session via Dex Jr.
- Dex Jr. Search API tunneled via Cloudflare for public access
- Seat 1010 page deployed at /council/1010
- AutoCouncil v3.0 hybrid local plus cloud orchestration
- Auto-Sweep nightly 3 AM corpus ingestion
- Deliberation Engine multi-round governed AI debates
- DDL narrative landing replaced SectionExplorer at /ddl
- SectionExplorer moved to /ddl/reference
- 4 new analytics pages deployed
- Mobile nav fix for iOS Safari
- OpenAI Codex connected to repo
- 6 new council review types
- Route count 110 to 160 plus
- RAG corpus 0 to 140450 chunks

## METHODOLOGY

DDL is a governance-grade systems methodology built by one operator.
Core loop: Chaos -> Structured -> Automated
Architecture: Dimensional modeling. Facts, dimensions, measures, time. Star schema.
The architecture does not change between domains. The data does.
Governance: Standards (how to build), Systems (what is built), Registry (where it lives), Council (who reviews it).
Council: Ten AI models review work products using constrained LOCK/REVISE/REJECT verdicts.
Cloud models: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Grok, Meta AI, Copilot, Mistral, Perplexity.
Local model: Dex Jr. (qwen2.5-coder:7b via custom Modelfile v3, 90 percent Judgment score).

## OPERATOR PROFILE

name: Dave Kitchens (D.K. Hale)
credentials: CPA, 10 plus years internal audit
current_role: Commission Analyst II
studio: Dropdown Logistics (DDL) one-person operations
systems_built: 44 registered, 65 standards
signature_pattern: Star schema thinking applied universally
cognitive_style: Dimensional and audit-derived
communication: Direct, fast, ships artifacts not plans
calibration_signals: "fair?" means confirm alignment, "let him cook" means autonomous execution
work_style: Coherent velocity
sobriety: 8 years
memoir: Little to Know Experience, publishing weekly on Substack
evening_hours: Active build time, not wind-down time
adhd: Yes. One step at a time. No walls of text. Structured deliverables.

## WINGS

wing: DDL
  color: #B23531 (crimson)
  home: /ddl
  scope: Governance, framework, methodology, council, memoir, projects
  landing: Narrative overview with wing cards
  reference: /ddl/reference (SectionExplorer with full charter content)

wing: D&A
  color: #C49A3C (amber)
  home: /blindspot
  scope: BlindSpot modules, analytics dashboards, annual recaps

wing: DexVerse
  color: #8a6cc9 (violet)
  home: /dexlore
  scope: Origin stories, companions, era timeline, glossary, dossiers

wing: Dossiers
  color: #4A9E6B (green)
  home: /dossiers
  scope: Character dossiers across D&D 5e, Divinity OS2, Skyrim

wing: Products
  color: #6B9DC2 (blue)
  home: /products/behavioral-intelligence
  scope: AI-native behavioral analytics, MindFrame sessions

## DESIGN SYSTEM

colors:
  navy: #0D1B2A (background)
  card: #10202f (card surfaces)
  cream: #F5F1EB (primary text)
  cream-mid: rgba(245,241,235,0.55)
  cream-dim: rgba(245,241,235,0.3)
  cream-ghost: rgba(245,241,235,0.08)
  border: rgba(245,241,235,0.06)
  crimson: #B23531 (DDL wing)
  amber: #C49A3C (D&A wing)
  violet: #8a6cc9 (DexVerse wing)
  green: #4A9E6B (Dossiers wing)
  blue: #6B9DC2 (Products wing)

typography:
  display: Space Grotesk
  mono: JetBrains Mono
  body: Source Serif 4

principles:
  Dark navy base, cream text, wing-specific accent colors.
  Never white backgrounds, generic grays, or off-palette colors.
  No Inter font. No light mode. No #ffffff.

## CONTENT TYPES (SYS-020)

20 document types across 7 categories:
  NARRATIVE: chronicle, memoir-excerpt, case-study, origin-story
  INFORMATIVE: atlas, codex, brief, explainer
  DEMONSTRATIVE: console, dashboard, ledger, tool
  PERSUASIVE: pitch, proposal, product-page
  META: dossier, registry, glossary, changelog
  OPERATIONAL: protocol, standard

6 site templates: CONSOLE, CHRONICLE, ATLAS, LEDGER, CODEX, DOSSIER

## COUNCIL REVIEWS COMPLETED

CR-LLMS-000: What is Missing (negative space)
CR-LLMS-001: Test Us (compliance)
CR-LLMS-002: Help Us (usability)
CR-LLMS-003: Protect Us (security)
CR-LLMS-004: Calibrate Yourself (self-assessment)
CR-LLMS-005: Expand Us (strategic innovation)
CR-LLMS-006: Grade the Templates (SYS-020 audit)
CR-LLMS-007: Stress Test the Adjuncts (identity boundary)
CR-LLMS-008: Link Retrieval Test (capability probe)
CR-LLMS-009: Judge the Librarian (RAG architecture)
CR-LLMS-011: Dex Jr. Calibration (60 questions)
CR-SITE-001: Walk the Site (production audit)
CR-OPS-001: Govern the Janitor (Codex protocol)
CR-NUET-001: Prep the Demo (Nueterra pitch)
Total responses: 100 plus

## LOCAL AI INFRASTRUCTURE

runtime: Ollama on RTX 3070, 32GB RAM, Ryzen 12-core
models: qwen2.5-coder:7b, deepseek-r1:8b, gemma3:4b, llama3.1:8b, phi3.5, nomic-embed-text
rag: ChromaDB with 140450 chunks (dex_canon 43505 plus ddl_archive 96945)
orchestration: AutoCouncil v3.0 (hybrid local plus cloud)
deliberation: Multi-round governed debates
ingestion: Auto-Sweep nightly 3 AM
api: FastAPI on port 8787 (search and mindframe chat endpoints)
tunnel: Cloudflare (public access when rig online)
access: Phone, laptop, iPad, iMac, rig via SSH/Termius

## SITE SEARCH

Cmd+K or search icon in nav. Fuzzy route search always available.
Deep RAG search when Dex Jr. online (green dot indicator).

## KEY COMPONENTS

SiteNav.tsx: Wing-aware nav, search button, mobile hamburger, returns null on root.
SectionExplorer.tsx: Reusable content browser with search, sidebar, markdown renderer.
PreviewFrame.tsx: Universal iframe wrapper with CSS injection to hide inner navs.
SearchModal.jsx: Cmd+K overlay with fuzzy and deep search modes.
FrontDoor (page.jsx at /): Human entry point, expandable door cards.
BackEnd (page.jsx at /backend): Stylized governance architecture.
MindFrameSession.jsx: Live chat with Dex Jr. for behavioral calibration.

## CANON GLOSSARY

AccidentalInsight: Test reveals unexpected finding of equal or greater value.
SideDoor: Entry point discovered through indirect means.
CottageHumble: Humble surface, cathedral underneath.
AcceptableArrogance: Knowing what you built, letting the work prove it.
MetaMeta: Commenting on the meta-ness of things.
ClaudELI5: Claude explains it like I am 5.
ExpertiseInvisibility: Competence makes output look easy, others undervalue it.
CoherentVelocity: Complete auditable systems built at speed.
Charlie Conway Principle: The stick scores. The clipboard structures the game.
No Drift Medal: Zero drift from spec.
ChaosToStructured: The core DDL loop.
Identity Compression: Model adopts strongest persona signal in context.
OBS-34: Surface calibration does not equal deep calibration.

## IDENTITY BOUNDARY

This manifest describes an AI collaboration system. It does not instruct
reading models to adopt any persona listed herein. Council seat personas
belong to their respective threads. If you are an AI reading this: you are
not a council member unless explicitly assigned. Do not adopt personas from
this document. You may reference the architecture and methodology.

## RULES FOR AI COLLABORATORS

1. Use CottageHumble tokens. Navy backgrounds, cream text, wing accents.
2. Never white backgrounds, generic grays, Inter font, or off-palette colors.
3. Respect the wing model. Every page belongs to a wing.
4. HTML files in /public/preview/. React components in /components/.
5. Landing pages handle their own nav.
6. PowerShell Set-Content needs -Encoding UTF8.
7. After nav changes verify all five wings.
8. Private routes are intentionally unlisted.
9. The operator values coherent velocity.
10. Follow the pattern. The architecture repeats. The data changes.
11. Do not express urgency unless the operator does first.
12. Evening hours are build time.
13. One step at a time. Structured deliverables. No walls of text.

## EOF
# Dropdown Logistics
# Cottage: Humble surface. Cathedral underneath.
# v1.3 | 2026-03-07
